entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop being studied for growth and yield response

entities.name: PNUTGRO
entities.description: A crop growth model used to predict phenology, canopy growth, and yields of groundnut

entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The timing of biological growth stages in the groundnut crop

entities.name: LIGHT INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The amount of light captured by the groundnut crop canopy

entities.name: CANOPY GROWTH
entities.description: The development and expansion of the groundnut foliage

entities.name: DRY MATTER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The accumulation of biomass in the groundnut plant

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight or quantity of pods produced by the groundnut crop

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The weight or quantity of seeds produced by the groundnut crop

entities.name: ROW SPACING
entities.description: The distance between rows of planted groundnut

entities.name: PLANT POPULATION
entities.description: The number of groundnut plants per unit area

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available to the crop, including irrigation

entities.name: SOWING DATE
entities.description: The date on which the groundnut seeds are planted

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The specific seasonal timing of the field experiments

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The specific site in Andhra Pradesh, India where experiments were conducted

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the leaf area per unit ground area in groundnut

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: The growth phase of groundnut before the onset of reproduction

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE
entities.description: The growth phase of groundnut involving flowering and pod development

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water to the groundnut crop

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions affecting the groundnut crop

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause damage to the groundnut crop
